utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided (October 15-19, 2024) – specific dates – fully specified.
- transportation: Labeled as Flight with details (round-trip, flight numbers, times) and cost €125 – appears fully specified, though airline name is generic "Budget Airline" but includes flight numbers and schedule, meets "flight details with costs".
- accommodation: Name (Adventure Lodge), duration (4 nights, dates), cost €220 – fully specified; hotel selection with cost met.
- activities: List with names and individual costs – fully specified.
- additional_services: Provided with name, details, and cost – fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides total_cost, budget_limit, remaining_funds – complete cost breakdown present (though not itemized math verification, but it is a breakdown). Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered.
